snippet.title: Jathi Ratnalu Official Trailer | Naveen Polishetty | Anudeep KV | Swapna Cinema
snippet.description:

snippet.title: Chaavu Kaburu Challaga - Official Trailer | Kartikeya, Lavanya Tripathi | Koushik | #CKCTrailer
snippet.description:
Presenting you the official trailer of #ChaavuKaburuChallaga Ft. #Kartikeya, #LavanyaTripathi, Murali Sharma, Aamani, Srikanth Iyengar, Bhadram, Mahesh & others.

Catch the Entertaining #ChaavuKaburuChallaga in Theatres From March 19th!

Chaavu Kaburu Challaga is an upcoming Telugu Feature Film Presented by Allu Aravind, Ft. Kartikeya, Lavanya Tripathi, Aamani & others in Lead Roles, Directed by Koushik Pegallapati, Music by Jakes Bejoy & Produced by Bunny Vas Under GA2 Pictures.

Episode 3115: Bhogilal Enters Jethalal's Life Once Again
---------------------------------------------------------
Sunder plays the call recording of the land deal to everyone present in the Gada household. While hearing this, Jethalal, Taarak, Sodhi and Bhide find out that the voice of the buyer is somewhat familiar. After investigating a little, they find out that it is indeed Bhogilal who has come into Jethalal's life once again, albeit as a buyer. Catch the fun and watch the full episode on SonyLIV.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: WB Election 2021: 'দীর্ঘদিন একসঙ্গে থাকার দাম দিল', টিকিট না পেয়ে কান্না ভেঙে পড়লেন সোনালি গুহ
snippet.description:
সাতগাছিয়ায় টিকিট না পেয়ে কান্নায় ভেঙে পড়লেন তৃণমূল বিধায়ক সোনালি গুহ। বললেন, দীর্ঘদিন একসঙ্গে থাকার একটা দাম দিল মমতা বন্দ্যোপাধ্যায় (Mamata Banerjee) ও তৃণমূল কংগ্রেস। ভালোই সম্মান পেলাম। তাঁর আক্ষেপ, আমি মমতাদির বাড়ির লোক ছিলাম। মমতাদি এটা করতে পারেন, বিশ্বাস করতে পারছি না। কান্নায় ভেঙে পড়ে বললেন, দিদি যেন এবারও মুখ্যমন্ত্রী হতে পারেন।
#TMCCandidateList #TMC #WBPolls #WestBengalElectionNews #ABPAnanda #ABPAnandaLive

Episode 3116: Will Jethalal's Plan Be Successful?
---------------------------------------------------------
Jethalal and everyone from Gokuldham have made a plan to catch Bhogilal and get Jethalal's 50 lakh rupees back from him. Jethalal asks Taarak to be with Champaklal while the time of the deal as an accountant and everyone else will hide in the other room. Sundar calls Bhogilal and asks him to come to the party's house to complete the deal. Bhogilal agrees to come to the party's house.  Will Jethalal's Plan Be Successful? To know, watch the full episode.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV

Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: Shabd - A Women's Day Initiative from Truecaller - #ItsNotOK
snippet.description:
It's 2021, but that age-old problem named harassment still remains at large. 

In India alone, 1 woman falls victim to stalking every 55 minutes.

Sadly, this problem isn't addressed, not on prime time nor on any other avenue.

Here is a true story of a woman who’s actions spoke for society.

#SpeakUp and take action at http://tclr.se/2MMBwN4

snippet.title: DIVINE - Satya | Prod. by Karan Kanchan | Official Music Video
snippet.description:
Download & Stream: https://mai.lnk.to/punyapaap

“Satya” is from DIVINE’s sophomore body of work, Punya Paap. Stirring up a 90’s-esque vibe, the track pays a thunderous ode to the city of Mumbai and the bygone era of Bollywood films. Sampling the classic track Goli Maar Bheje Mein from the Ram Gopal Varma directed film, the OG wrecking crew comprising of DIVINE and Karan Kanchan unite to wreak havoc. 

#DIVINE #PunyaPaap #Satya 
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Download & Stream: https://mai.lnk.to/punyapaap

“Satya” is from DIVINE’s sophomore body of work, Punya Paap. Stirring up a 90’s-esque vibe, the track pays a thunderous ode to the city of Mumbai and the bygone era of Bollywood films. Sampling the classic track Goli Maar Bheje Mein from the Ram Gopal Varma directed film, the OG wrecking crew comprising of DIVINE and Karan Kanchan unite to wreak havoc.

snippet.title: Paatashaala -Yuvarathnaa(Kannada) | Puneeth Rajkumar|Santhosh Ananddram |Vijay Prakash|Hombale Films
snippet.description:
Presenting 'PAATASHAALA', a lyrical video song, from Puneeth Rajkumar's upcoming Kannada film 'Yuvarathnaa', Directed by Santhosh Ananddram, Music by Thaman S, Produced by Vijay Kiragandur under Hombale Films. 

Visit 'Paatasala', and reminisce the place, that has laid out a foundation, for your today. With latest Kannada songs by Thaman S, as expressive and stirring, built with a large number of musicians and their instruments. 
The richness in this Kannada music shall remind you of your roots, unforgotten. 

If this isn't plenty enough? Subscribe to Hombale Films YouTube Channel for viewing many more of such Kannada new songs and videos. 
http://bit.ly/SubscribetoHombaleFilms

Song Details:
Song Name : Paatashaala
Singer : Vijay Prakash
Lyricist : Santhosh Ananddram
Music Director : Thaman S

snippet.title: Nenjam Marappathillai Public Review | Nenjam Marappathillai Review | Selvaragavan | SJ Surya | Yuvan
snippet.description:
#Selvaragavan #Nenjammarappathillai #Yuvan
GK Dairy - http://www.tamilmilk.com/

Nenjam Marappathillai Public Reviews | Nenjam Marappathillai Theatre Response 

Nenjam Marappathillai is an Indian Tamil-language horror film written and directed by Selvaraghavan. Jointly produced by Escape Artists Motion Pictures, Southside Studios and GLO Studios, the film features S. J. Suryah, Regina Cassandra and Nandita Swetha. Yuvan Shankar Raja composed the film score and soundtrack, with cinematography and editing were handled respectively by Arvind Krishna and Prasanna GK.

CREDITS

snippet.title: Dhamaka | Official Teaser | Kartik Aaryan | Ram Madhvani | Netflix India
snippet.description:
Sometimes all it takes is one phone call to change lives.

A frustrated ex-news anchor is given another chance to go live on prime time television when a terrorist calls him with a bomb threat. Little does he know that this call will change his life and throw him into a fast-paced game of betrayal.

Catch Kartik Aaryan in an intense, never seen before avatar, in Dhamaka, coming soon on Netflix.

A Netflix Original film 
RSVP and Ram Madhvani Films present 
In association with

snippet.title: E Bull Jet നെ ശബരിമലയിൽ കൊണ്ട് പോയപ്പോൾ 🚐 Van Life in Pathanamthitta !!
snippet.description:
E Bull Jet ന്റെ വണ്ടിയിൽ പത്തനംതിട്ടയിൽ ഒരു വാൻ ലൈഫ്, എബിനെയും ലിബിനെയും ശബരിമലയിൽ കൊണ്ട് പോയപ്പോൾ 🚐 Van Life in Pathanamthitta #techtraveleat 

Goosebery യുടെ പ്രൊഡക്ടുകൾ വാങ്ങുന്നതിന് https://www.goosebery.com/​​​​​​​​ വെബ്‌സൈറ്റ് സന്ദർശിക്കുക. ‘TECHTRAVELEAT’ എന്ന കൂപ്പൺ കോഡ് ഉപയോഗിക്കുന്നവർക്ക് 20% ഡിസ്‌കൗണ്ട് കൂടുതലായി ലഭിക്കും.

Table of Content
00:00 Intro
02:55 വീട്ടിൽ നിന്നും യാത്രയാകുന്നു
03:13 ആരാധകർക്കൊപ്പം
03:46 E Bull Jet ൻ്റെ നെപ്പോളിയനെ ഞാൻ നയിച്ചപ്പോൾ
08:45 സോഡ കുടിക്കാൻ വഴിയരികിൽ വണ്ടി നിർത്തിയപ്പോൾ 
09:11 ശബരിമല റൂട്ടിലേക്ക്
11:22 ഫുൾ ടാങ്ക് ഡീസലടിച്ച് പ്രതിഷേധം
15:03 പാട്ടും പാടി എബിനും ലിബിനും
23:09 നിലയ്ക്കൽ എത്തുന്നു
32:12 പമ്പ കെഎസ്ആർടിസി സ്റ്റാൻഡിൽ എത്തിയപ്പോൾ
34:07 പമ്പാ നദിയുടെ ഇപ്പോഴത്തെ അവസ്ഥ
36:18 പമ്പയിൽ നിന്നും തിരിച്ച് വീട്ടിലേക്ക്


**** Follow us on ****

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/techtraveleat/
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/techtraveleat/
Twitter: https://twitter.com/techtraveleat
Website: http://www.techtraveleat.com

*** Cameras & Gadgets I am using ***

1) GoPro Hero 9 Black: https://amzn.to/3poRV83
2) GoPro Hero 8 Black: https://amzn.to/2WKR45l
3) GoPro Max 360 Camera: https://amzn.to/31EyeyO
4) iPhone 12 Pro Max: https://amzn.to/3pBZHfd
5) Canon M50: https://amzn.to/3iimE38
6) Tripod for Camera: https://amzn.to/3kw3iJJ

snippet.title: POMEGRANATE JUICE | 100KG Pomegranate Fruits Cutting | Making Fruit Juice in Village | Healthy Drink
snippet.description:
Today we make Pomegranate Juice by using 100 KG fresh pomegranate fruit. We cut and open all the pomegranate and then we make sweat milk to make a healthy fruit drink.

Finally, we enjoy the healthy fruit juice with a palm leaf. The taste is Yummy!

snippet.title: मेरा नया किचन | My New Kitchen Tour | KabitasKitchen Kitchen Tour | Kabitaslifestyle |Kabitaskitchen
snippet.description:
#Kabitaskitchen #kabitavlogs #KitchenTour #MyNewKitchen

६ साल मेहनत करने के बाद आज ये मेरा सपना पूरा हुआ, बहुत बहुत धन्यवाद आपलोगो का ....आप सब ने मेरा हर कदम पर साथ दिया 🙏
मैंने ये किचन अपने वीडियो को और अच्छा बनाने के लिए बनवाया है, मेरे बनाने के तरीके में या कुकिंग में कोई अंतर नहीं आएगा .....क्यूकि आपलोगों को मेरा पुराना अंदाज़ पसंद है इसलिए मैं उस बात का पूरा ध्यान रखूंगी  :)

snippet.title: Koi Hor - Dilnoor Ft. Afsana & B Praak | Sara Gurpal | Gurnazar | Shabby - New Punjabi Songs 2021
snippet.description:
Pellet Drum Productions Presents "Koi Hor" which tells the story of a girl who is expecting her lover to come and confess his wrongdoings before it’s conveyed by a third person and before it's too late. “It’s a song that everybody can relate to. It talks about how we expect our loved ones to be honest with us. 

♪ Full Song Available on ♪

snippet.title: Dooriyan (Official Video) Raghav Chaitanya | Shivin Narang, Apoorva Arora | Anurag Saikia | Kunaal V
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals presents Dooriyan sung by the youth sensation Raghav Chaitanya and the music video stars Shivin Narang and Apoorva Arora. This song has been finely composed by Anurag Saikia & written by Kunaal Vermaa. The video has been directed by Karan Anshuman who narrates a gripping story, where Shivin and Apoorva portray an estranged couple who later realise the true value of love. The story unfolds intense situations and memories of their past. 

People say you don’t know what you’ve got until it's gone. But the truth is, you knew what you had, you just never thought you’d lose it… watch till the end to see how Shivins desperate search ends.

#Shivin #Apoorva #VYRLOriginals

🎶 Listen 🎧  🎶 Now On 📲 🤳

♫ JioSaavn - https://www.jiosaavn.com/album/dooriyan/ML8KgFeVJQs_

♫ Gaana - https://gaana.com/song/dooriyan-78

♫ Wynk - https://wynk.in/u/UxhAqGaZN

♫ Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/track/13u4qQ9xi2DFUUZY5yRVkN?si=cA1lx3OzSzqYKHteqnPjNw

♫ Apple Music - https://music.apple.com/in/album/dooriyan/1555654016?i=1555655056

♫ Amazon Prime Music - https://music.amazon.in/albums/B08XLWD8G4?marketplaceId=A21TJRUUN4KGV&musicTerritory=IN&trackAsin=B08XMJC9N8

♫ Resso - https://m.resso.app/ZSJ8jJGcD/

snippet.title: STEPHEN HAWKING की 5 भयानक भविष्यवाणियाँ जो सच होने जा रही है Stephen Hawking's Prediction
snippet.description:
Signup karo,skills dikhao paisa kamao aur account me daalo instantly! 
Link: https://skcl.sh/uSkARm
Abhi register karo (NO APP INSTALL)!
#Skillclash

Hello friends, we all know about the world famous scientists stephen hawking. We know about his research in relativity, blackholes, quantum mechanics, end of universe, big bang theory, beginning of universe, time travel etc. 
But did you know that he has also done some serious predictions about our future and the future of humanity. The following are some of the warnings stated by stephen hawking.
1 - He has warned us about earth`s highly increasing global warming rate.
2-He has warned us about humanity`s constant strive for genetically modified organisms or even genetically modified human for that matter.
3- He has made us aware about the probable problems that can occur from our constant growth in the high tech artificial intelligence area.

Well this is just a small little gist of the multiple problems that exist and may exist. 
So stay tuned in our today's video to know more!

snippet.title: Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 05 Teaser - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 5th March 2021
snippet.description:
Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 05 Teaser - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 5th March 2021

Subscribe to our channel so you never miss any of your favorite dramas https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family’s class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.
Though Mahi appreciates Farhad’s efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi’s heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-crossed souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?
Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment
Singer: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan & Nish Asher
Lyrics: Qamar Nashad
Composer: Naveed Nashad

Cast :
Iqra Aziz As Mahi
Feroz Khan As Farhad
Rubina Ashraf As Bari Sarkar
Hina Bayat As Maa Ji
Junaid Khan As Sikandar
Mirza Zain Baig As Taimoor
Usman Peerzada As Kazim
Javed Shaikh As Nisar
Seemi Pasha As Nisar’s Wife
Asma Abbas As Farhad’s Mother
Waseem Abbas As Taufeeq Ahmed
Sunita Marshal As Sahiba
Tooba Siddique As Romana
Sohail Sameer As Nazim
Meherbano As Rida
Shameen Khan As Sajjal

#HappilacPaints 
#Colors0fHappiness
#HappilacWipeout

snippet.title: Kamal Sir has Watched my Video - Blacksheep Award Function 🔥 - Emotional Day - Irfan's View
snippet.description:
#Kamal #BlackSheepAward #Irfansview 

A very big day for me, getting recognition for what we do gives us the real happiness. I would like to thank Black sheep for creating such a wonderful moment and Irfan's View family for supporting from the beginning. I will never every forget this day as I got a chance to stand near Ulaga Nayagan Kamal Haasan. He recognized me after seeing me and said he watches my videos. What more will I ask when he gave me the feel of real victory. I was in the Seventh heaven and I went speechless.
_______________________________

snippet.title: Huttu Habbada Shubhashayagalu - Official Teaser | Diganth | Kavitha Gowda |  Dr.TR Chandrashekaar
snippet.description:
Here is The Official Teaser of "Huttu Habbadha Shubhashayagalu" Directed By Nagaraj Bethur, Produced By Dr. TR Chandrashekaar. 

A story of how the crime was born? Murder offences, Relationships, and investigations are all set to leave you thrilled. As the game has just begun with 'Huttu Habbada Shubhashayagalu.'
Who's the guilty victim? Let's wait for the Kannada movie coming soon while we watch the Teaser starring Diganth Manchale in a dapper look.

Producer :- Dr. TR CHANDRASHEKAAR 
Presenter :- C NANDA KISHORE
Production House : CRYSTAL PAARK CINEMAS
Director :- NAGARAJ BETHUR 

Star Cast :- Diganth, Kavita Gowda, Chethan Gandarva, Madenur Manu, Suraj, Surya, Vanisri, Rohit Rangaswamy, Shanaya Katwe, Sharanya Shetty, Sridatta, Srihari, Sujay Shastry, Ratan Ram, Amoghavarsha, Ajay Gaja

Story,Screenplay :- Prasanna V.M. 
Director of Photography :- Abhilash Kalathi 
Editor :- Srikanth Shroff 
Music :- Sridhar V. Sambram 
Background Score :- Anand Raja Vikram
Lyrics :- Yograj Bhat 
Dialogues :- Venu Hasralli 
Art :- Raghavendra Mysore, Raghu(Blacky) 

Direction Department: Rajat Suriya, Om Raghu, Nandan Telkar, Narendra Babu. 
Cameraman Team: Mohan, Annappa, Madhusudhan 
Guitars - Abhishek Bose
Sound and Foley - Babychen Paul
Trailer Mix and Master by:  Dhanasekar
Production Designer: Baalu Kumta 
Daily Incharge: Guru A Nanjanagud
Dubbing: Renu Studio (Suresh Guna)
Costumes: Dayananda Bhadravathi
VFX:-Animantra (Deepak Gowda)
Colorist :- Karthik Ananth
Choreography :- Mohan (Bajarangi)
Sound Mixed By :- Rahul Ranjan
Publicity Design :- Ashwin Ramesh PRO :- Sudhindra Venkatesh 

Film Partners :- Crystal Paark Inn (Mysore), Crystal Paark Distributors, Microbharat Software Pvt Ltd

Watch the Latest Promo of popular Tamil Serial #Roja that airs on Sun TV.

Watch your favorite serials Free on Sun NXT, immediately after TV. Offer Valid till 25th Mar 2021

Roja is a drama serial on Sun TV. Shanthamurthy, runs his ashram for orphans along with Roja, a compassionate young woman. Maruthanayagam’s greed to seize the orphanage results in bad blood between his daughter Sakshi and Roja. The story unfolds how Roja realizes her dream for the ashram, amidst love, betrayal and her mysterious past.

snippet.title: Bhogilal Ki Asliyat! | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा - Ep 3115
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku 

Produced By: Neela Asit Modi, Asit Kumarr Modi 
Special Thanks: Mahesh Vakil, Indu Tarak Mehta
Set Design: Jayant Deshmukh

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा | Episode 583 | 1st March, 2021
snippet.description:
Subscribe to Sony Pal: http://www.youtube.com/sonypalindia

Episode 583: Popatlal Gives A Shock
-------------------------------------
Bhide and Madhavi are still in their dreamland, where they are rich and affluent. Meanwhile, at Abdul's soda shop, Popatlal informs everyone about the rampant email frauds taking place these days.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.
tags: Tarak Mehta ka ooltah chashmah funniest episode ever

snippet.title: Starship | SN10 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
As early as Wednesday, March 3, the SpaceX team will attempt a high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 10 (SN10) – our third high-altitude suborbital flight test of a Starship prototype from SpaceX’s site in Cameron County, Texas. Similar to the high-altitude flight tests of Starship SN8 and SN9, SN10 will be powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee – approximately 10 km in altitude. SN10 will perform a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype will descend under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control Starship’s attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. SN10’s Raptor engines will then reignite as the vehicle attempts a landing flip maneuver immediately before touching down on the landing pad adjacent to the launch mount. 

A controlled aerodynamic descent with body flaps and vertical landing capability, combined with in-space refilling, are critical to landing Starship at destinations across the solar system where prepared surfaces or runways do not exist, and returning to Earth. This capability will enable a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.  

Given the dynamic schedule of development testing, stay tuned to our social media channels for updates as we move toward SpaceX’s third high-altitude flight test of Starship!

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta

snippet.description:
Mayura feels restless by the fact that her child was taken away by Omkar and decides to get her child back from him. Tune in to the sneak peek of the forthcoming episode.
#ColorsTV #PinjaraKhubsurtiKa

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Mayura is the epitome of beauty, grace and intelligence, but the world only sees her beauty. Trapped in a cage by a society that judges by looks, Mayura yearns for her freedom to fly free. What happens to her fight for individuality when she ends up in a marriage with Omkar, a control freak obsessed with her beauty? Will he ever see his wife beyond her physical form? Will Mayura ever fulfil her own dreams? Or will she remain trapped in her beautiful pinjaraa for life?

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.

snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Kanyadaan" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Kanyadaan: Synopsis : Kanyadan is a story of a father Anjan Basu - a History teacher and his five daughters. After his wife’s demise, Anjan Basu had always been the guiding light & the support system to his daughters’ life, which paved its way even after they got married. He has always guarded his daughters with all his principles & ideals, through all the complexities of life and lead them with love to get them through and survive. The story revolves around the lives of these characters and their journey.

snippet.title: Kadhal Ne Kaayam Ne | Episode 7 | Tamil Web Series | Circus Gun Tamil | Silly Monks
snippet.description:
Kadhal Ne Kaayam Ne | Episode 7 | Tamil Web Series | Circus Gun Tamil | Silly Monks

Bala brings Nivetha to the hospital she is in little dizzy, the doctor is saying nothing to worry and the baby also safe. Bala is very shocked when the doctor says this news. This was said by Bala to Priya. She cries out, "Why did you do that?" She cries thinking about how this society sees me and my child. Bala came to drink as usual. Bala's friend Shiva finds Bala and he shouted out to Bala this drinking habit is the cause of everything. Later on, Nivedha gets cured and the doctor insisting to take care of her health. Bala asks Niveda who is responsible for your pregnancy. 
To Be Continued...
